description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine two_term_dc_converter_data_3, and is implemented by a call to two_term_dc_converter_data_3. Use this API to modify the data of a dc converter of an existing two-terminal dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Area Interchange Data). The dc line must have previously been specified via the TWO_TERMINAL_DC_LINE_DATA API. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr, realaro = two_term_dc_convr_data(cnvflg, dc, intgar, realari, id)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = two_term_dc_convr_data(cnvflg, dc, intgar, realari, id)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which data for one of its converters is to be specified; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of 11 elements specifying values REALAR(1) through REALAR(11) as described above. (input).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Ac transformer circuit identifier, idr or idi. (input; ‘1’ by default).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of 4 elements specifying values REALAR(12) through REALAR(15) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: IPR or IPI, converter bus number (no default allowed).
NBR or NBI, number of bridges in series (0 by default).
ICR or ICI, zero or bus number of firing angle bus (0 by default).
IFR or IFI, zero or bus number of winding one side of a two-winding ac transformer (0 by default).
ITR or ITI, zero or bus number of winding two side of a two-winding ac transformer (0 by default).

realari.description: NR or ANMNI, minimum firing angle (90.0 by default).
XR or ANMXI, maximum firing angle (0.0 by default).
RCR or RCI, commutating resistance (0.0 by default).
XCR or XCI, commutating reactance (0.0 by default).
EBASR or EBASI, primary base ac voltage (0.0 by default).
TRR or TRI, transformer ratio (1.0 by default).
TAPR or TAPI, tap setting (1.0 by default).
TMXR or TMXI, maximum tap setting (1.5 by default).
TMNR or TMNI, minimum tap setting (0.51 by default).
STPR or STPI, tap step (0.00625 by default).
XCAPR or XCAPI, capacitive reactance of CCC type converter (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: transformer circuit identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Converter bus is dummy bus of a multi-section line. - Multi-section line grouping deleted. - Converter maximum angle is less than its minimum angle. - Converter maximum tap is less than its minimum tap. - Invalid tap step. - Commutating bus not found. - ac transformer bus not found. - Specified branch not found. - Specified branch is not a transformer. - From bus of specified branch is not winding one side bus.
